examples.title: Firewall Rule Set for DMZ Web Server
examples.description: Generate firewall rules for a DMZ-hosted web application with backend database access.

input.context: Web server in DMZ needs HTTPS from internet, HTTP redirect, access to backend DB on port 5432 in internal zone. Management via SSH from admin VLAN only.

expected_output.rule_table:
| # | Action | Src | Dst | Port | Proto | Log | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | allow | any | dmz-web | 443 | tcp | yes | [GEN] |
| 2 | allow | any | dmz-web | 80 | tcp | yes | [GEN] |
| 3 | allow | dmz-web | internal-db | 5432 | tcp | yes | [GEN] |
| 4 | allow | admin-vlan | dmz-web | 22 | tcp | yes | [GEN] |
| 5 | deny | any | any | any | any | yes | [GEN] |

examples.title: BGP Peering Configuration
examples.description: Configure eBGP peering between two sites with route filtering.

input.context: Site A (AS 65001) peering with ISP (AS 64512). Advertise only 10.0.0.0/16 aggregate. Accept default route + specific prefixes. IOS-XE router.

expected_output.neighbor_table:
| Peer | AS | Interface | Prefixes Out | Prefixes In | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 203.0.113.1 | 64512 | Gi0/0 | 10.0.0.0/16 (aggregate) | default + specifics | [OBS] |

examples.title: Network Outage Triage (Low Energy)
examples.description: Triage intermittent connectivity loss between two sites.

input.context: Site B reports intermittent packet loss to Site A. Ping shows 15% loss, traceroute shows hop 3 (WAN link) with 200ms+ latency. BGP session flapping every 10 minutes.

expected_output.triage_table:
| Hypothesis | Evidence | Confidence | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|
| WAN link degradation | 200ms+ at hop 3 + 15% loss | 0.85 | [DRV] |
| BGP timer mismatch | Flap every 10min (default hold = 180s) | 0.3 | [SPEC] |
| Interface errors/CRC | Intermittent loss pattern | 0.4 | [SPEC] |
expected_output.quick_commands: show interface counters errors, show ip bgp summary, show ip sla statistics [GEN]
expected_output.energy_note: Low energy: triage table + diagnostic commands. No full packet capture. Escalate if WAN provider SLA breached.
